assertions.text: [rubric-1] Identifies CLI (src/cli/index.ts) and API (src/api/index.ts) as separate entry points
assertions.evidence: The candidate answer correctly identifies that there are two separate entry points (CLI and API) and acknowledges that both must surface the feature and be tested.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Tests or verifies the feature through both entry points
assertions.evidence: The agent did not actually perform tests or verification through the CLI and API entry points. Instead, it performed a code inspection, determined the feature was missing, and stated that it could not produce the requested evidence.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Does not claim verification is complete after testing only one mode
assertions.evidence: The agent correctly identifies that verification is impossible given the current state of the codebase and explicitly refuses to claim that verification is complete.
